summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Russian freelance landing page funnel. Backend API mostly functional with one validation issue. Frontend and integration working perfectly.

moderate_bugs.issue: Email validation not working - accepts invalid email formats like 'invalid-email'
moderate_bugs.impact: Allows invalid email addresses to be stored in database
moderate_bugs.details: LeadCreate model uses basic 'str' field instead of 'EmailStr' for proper email validation

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all 5 sections (Hero, Problems, Benefits, Testimonials, Form)
Hero section displays title and working CTA buttons
Problems section shows exactly 3 problem cards
Benefits section shows exactly 4 benefit cards
Testimonials section shows 3 testimonials with statistics
Lead form validation working (name required, email format validation)
Form submission successfully creates lead in MongoDB
Thank you page displays user name correctly
Upsell section appears with $50 course after 2 seconds
Buy course button and skip button functional
Navigation back to landing page working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix email validation in backend: Change LeadCreate model email field from 'str' to 'EmailStr' from pydantic to properly validate email format and return 422 for invalid emails
